LinkedIn Post Bank - Week 1 (Block 3)

Usage
- Pick one post per day.
- Include one CTA link with UTM tags.
- Keep comments active for first 45 minutes.

Post 1: Cash Leak Diagnosis
Hook:
Most founder-led teams don’t have a traffic problem.
They have a leak problem between inquiry and booked call.

Body:
We’ve been installing a simple operating stack:
- qualification-first intake
- same-day follow-up discipline
- weekly winner/loser testing on headline + offer

When this is wired correctly, booked calls move before ad spend does.

CTA:
If you want the exact architecture, here’s the qualification lane:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=b3_w1_linkedin_cash-leak&utm_content=post1

Post 2: Founder Control Narrative
Hook:
Autonomy is useless if it removes founder control.

Body:
The right setup keeps decisions at founder level and automates execution lanes:
- outbound operations
- qualification routing
- KPI reporting
- exception-only escalation

Speed without loss of strategic control is the objective.

CTA:
See the operating model:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=b3_w1_linkedin_founder-control&utm_content=post2

Post 3: $1k/day Reality
Hook:
$1,000/day isn’t a motivation problem.
It’s a systems problem.

Body:
You need:
1) consistent demand generation
2) no-leak follow-up
3) tight qualification
4) weekly kill/keep decisions

Everything else is noise.

CTA:
Apply for a strategy call:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=b3_w1_linkedin_1kday&utm_content=post3

Post 4: Offer Framing
Hook:
A weak offer forces you to overwork channel tactics.

Body:
Your offer must answer:
- who exactly this is for
- what measurable outcome you create
- in what time window
- with what risk control

Then channels become multipliers.

CTA:
Qualification lane:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=b3_w1_linkedin_offer-frame&utm_content=post4

Post 5: Weekly Decision Discipline
Hook:
Great growth teams are great at killing losers quickly.

Body:
Every week we run one decision memo:
- winner variant
- loser variant
- KPI posture
- next challenger

No random pivots.

CTA:
If you want this discipline in your business:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=b3_w1_linkedin_decision-discipline&utm_content=post5
